decisions.briefing: Market is neutral today — S&P 500 +0.3%, NASDAQ +0.2% with no strong directional catalyst. Cash sits at $444.94, just below the $500 threshold, so no new positions are warranted. AAOI is the position to watch: down 4.9% from our $188.24 avg cost and approaching the -7% stop-loss at $175.26, but its technicals remain constructive (RSI 59.4, MACD bullish, price above SMA-20), so we hold and monitor.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged modestly higher on May 11 in a low-conviction session, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.3% and the Nasdaq adding 0.2%, as investors paused for consolidation after recent strength. Momentum continued in technology and clean-energy names, while broader participation remained selective. With no major economic data releases or Fed commentary, price action stayed range-bound and sentiment neutral.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月11日小幅收漲，標普500指數上漲0.3%，納斯達克指數上漲0.2%，市場在近期升勢後進入整固階段，成交量相對清淡。科技股及清潔能源板塊仍維持動能領漲格局，但整體市場參與度有限。由於缺乏重要經濟數據或美聯儲官員言論等催化劑，指數維持窄幅震盪，市場情緒中性偏謹慎。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-defined price level at which a position is automatically sold to cap downside risk. Our AAOI holding is currently at -4.9% from the $188.24 average cost, nearing the -7% trigger at $175.26. Stop-losses enforce discipline by preventing emotional decision-making from turning a manageable loss into a portfolio-damaging one.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止損（Stop-Loss）是投資者預先設定的賣出價位，一旦持倉虧損達到該水平便自動平倉，以控制下行風險。目前持倉AAOI較均價188.24美元下跌4.9%，逼近-7%的止損觸發線（即175.26美元）。預設止損機制能有效避免投資者在情緒驅動下作出決策，防止小虧損演變為影響整體組合的重大損失。
